description: Declares which artifacts to export as a Claude Code plugin. Machine-readable, no ambiguity.

classificationCriteria.base: No manifesto-specific paths/concepts. Works in any project as-is or with userConfig.
classificationCriteria.base-configurable: Contains manifesto-specific patterns as defaults, but configurable via userConfig. Exported with defaults replaced by config.json lookup.
classificationCriteria.domain: Hardcoded manifesto-specific logic. Not exported to base plugin.

l1-safety-check.sh.rationale: Generic dangerous-command detection, credential exfiltration prevention

l1-file-guard.sh.rationale: Generic secret-file write blocking, test tampering detection, hook self-protection

p2-verify-on-commit.sh.rationale: High-risk commit gating. Default patterns are generic; lean-formalization/ removed from defaults.

p3-compatibility-check.sh.rationale: Structural-file commit classification enforcement. Default patterns are generic; manifesto-specific paths removed.

p4-metrics-collector.sh.rationale: Generic tool-use logger. Already uses git rev-parse.

p4-drift-detector.sh.rationale: Generic behavioral drift detection (V4 block rate, V5 rejection rate)

rules-injector.sh.rationale: Injects rule content and CLAUDE.md minimal routing as additionalContext on session start. Required because plugin spec does not auto-load .claude/rules/.

evolve-metrics-recorder.sh.rationale: Records evolve-specific commit events to evolve-history.jsonl

evolve-state-loader.sh.rationale: Loads evolve history and checks Lean sorry count

h5-doc-lint.sh.rationale: Lean/Verso doc comment linting. Hardcoded lean-formalization/Manifest/ paths.

p3-axiom-evidence-check.sh.rationale: Axiom Card metadata checking. Hardcoded lean-formalization/ paths.

p4-manifest-refs-check.sh.rationale: artifact-manifest.json refs vs propositions list validation

p4-sync-counts-check.sh.rationale: Lean axiom/theorem count sync. Calls scripts/sync-counts.sh.

verifier.md.rationale: P2 independent verification core. Independence conditions (contextSeparated, framingIndependent, etc.) are generic. Domain-specific checklist items (Lean theorem quality, D1-D18 compliance) to be removed or made configurable.

judge.md.rationale: G1-G5 criteria reference manifesto concepts (V1-V7, T2)

observer.rationale: Tied to evolve-history.jsonl, deferred-status.json, Lean stats

integrator.rationale: Tied to evolve run recording, evolve-history.jsonl schema

l1-safety.md.rationale: Generic safety boundaries. No manifesto-specific content.

l1-sandbox-recommendation.md.rationale: Generic sandbox recommendation. No manifesto-specific content.

p3-governed-learning.md.rationale: Generic learning governance lifecycle. Compatibility classification is universal.
